description: CompositionBlue floral printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has three-quarter sleeves with a light blue tape detailing at the hem, Mandarin collar neck with blue tape detailing with thread detailing extending to a buttoned chest placket and blue tape with thread detailing running along the length of the kurta, and has pleats at the A-line front and back waist FittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this printed blue kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh in this A-line waist, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
